HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar Apr-30-2008 Text Ruling

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-14-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-14-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098.

Mercedes Gavin, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Matilde Leonetti, who was placed under oath and testified.
No appearances by defendants Miquel Canales, a/k/a Miguel Canales, and Patricia Canales.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial filed March 28, 2008.

Plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:

Exhibit 1---Three (3) Day Notice to Pay Rent or Quit dated 01/18/08-----------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---Residential Lease Rental Agreement
and Deposit Receipt dated 11/20/06--------------------------------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Matilde Leonetti, and against defendants MIQUEL CANALES, a/k/a MIGUEL CANALES, and PATRICIA CANALES as follows:

Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic shall recover from defendants MIQUEL CANALES, a/k/a MIGUEL CANALES, and PATRICIA CANALES Rent and Per Diem damages in the sum of $6,286.20, Attorney fees in the amount of $1,325.00, Costs in the amount of $345.00, for a Total Judgment for plaintiff Matilde Leonetti in the amount of $7,956.20.
Plaintiff Matilde Leonetti is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 4609A Mission Street, San Francisco, CA 94112. The lease is forfeited.

Counsel stipulates to the return of the Exhibit.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
